{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = obelisks (Cradle)
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Stone monuments covered in rings of script blink into existence during the event.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|In Obelisk, recruitment happens at the top of the Tower.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
